meta.source: Notion CMS — TMC Products + TMC Daily Updates

products.name: Beginner Tutorial
products.full_name: Build Your First Budget-Disciplined AI Research Loop
products.tagline: Go from zero to a running overnight research pipeline on one Mac mini.
products.description: A consulting-grade PDF that walks a non-coder through standing up the core TMC loop: data collection, the $55/month budget guardrail, cron scheduling, and Telegram delivery. Bundled with a starter Skill Pack.

products.name: Intermediate Tutorial
products.tagline: Add adversarial AI review and a real quality gate to your pipeline.
products.description: The middle tier: wire up the Maker/Checker dual-engine council (GLM-5.2 + GPT-5.6), build the freshness/completeness/schema quality gate, and add model-fallback chains. Bundled with the Dual-Engine + Quality Gate Skill Packs.

products.name: Flagship Tutorial
products.tagline: The full blueprint: 500 scripts, 115 crons, bilingual delivery, incident recovery.
products.description: The complete production system, documented end to end: architecture, 60-fix incident playbook, bilingual (EN/ZH) delivery, cron recovery, and the WATCHLIST_ONLY compliance model. Bundled with the full Skill Pack suite.

products.name: AI Workflow Audit
products.tagline: A 30-page written analysis of your AI research workflow + architecture map + cost model.
products.description: I review your current setup and deliver a written audit: architecture map, cost model, failure-mode analysis, and a prioritized fix list. For solo operators and serious investors building their own low-cost systems.

products.name: System Blueprint
products.description: The top-tier engagement: a 90-minute working session, a custom build roadmap tailored to your goals and budget, and 30 days of follow-up support as you implement.

products.name: Skill Packs
products.tagline: Budget Watchdog · Cron Recovery · Dual-Engine Council · Quality Gate.
products.description: Standalone, drop-in skill packs distilled from the TMC system. Each pack is a self-contained module you can adapt to your own pipeline. Priced $19-99 depending on the pack.

updates.title: Pre-market brief — risk-on into the open
updates.summary: Indices firm pre-open; semis leading. NVDA and AVGO bid on AI-capex headlines. Rates steady, VIX compressed. Core holdings mixed but constructive.
updates.compliance: For research only. Not investment advice. WATCHLIST_ONLY.

updates.title: System log — v13 bilingual delivery live
updates.summary: TMC frozen at v13 (v1.1.6). Bilingual delivery now live: English to Telegram, Chinese to Feishu via DeepSeek. 500/500 scripts compile, 0 high-severity bugs.
updates.compliance: System status update. WATCHLIST_ONLY research tool — no order routing.

updates.title: CRWV — CoreWeave capacity note
updates.summary: Dual-engine council reviewed CoreWeave datacenter capacity commentary. Engine B flagged one revenue-timing assumption in Engine A's model; divergence noted, not hidden.
updates.compliance: For research only. Not investment advice. WATCHLIST_ONLY.
